message:
chore(beads): add 15 beads for swarm performance + /dp tool integration

Two new epics:

1. wa-iehgn: Ultra-Performance for 200+ Agent Swarms (7 children)
   - Pane lifecycle management (zombie reap, stuck detect, age cleanup)
   - File descriptor management and pre-allocation
   - CPU pressure-aware scheduling (PSI-based, 4-tier throttling)
   - Competing build coordination (shared CARGO_TARGET_DIR)
   - Memory pressure engine (per-pane budgets, compression, eviction)
   - SIMD-accelerated output processing (vectorized scanning)
   - Lock-free hot-path data structures (formally verified)

2. wa-dr6zv: Integrate /dp Rust Tools (6 children)
   - dcg as native subsystem (per-pane command interception)
   - cass for agent context injection (search past sessions)
   - caut for quota-aware scheduling (rate limit detection)
   - tru/TOON for token-efficient communication (40%+ savings)
   - Unified TUI stack (charmed_rust + frankentui + rich_rust)
   - process_triage (automated kill hierarchy from perf-remediation)

Mandatory skills per bead: /extreme-software-optimization,
/alien-artifact-coding, /idea-wizard as appropriate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
